text:
According to this unconfirmed report, the Egyptian army
chief of staff will visit Jordan at the end of May to discuss implementation of the agreement.

the Egyptian air force is now conducting radar bombing practice with its IL-28 jet bombers. Difficulty in target identification by radar reportedly resulted in bombs being dropped
dangerously close to the Egyptian rocket testing installation
south of Cairo.

The Jordanian military mission which
visited Egypt will also visit Saudi Arabia
